findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-16T23-04-32Z-atlas.json — gi=0.74 mode=yellow source=live anomalies=[] seed_result=200 OK sustain_eligible=false kv_keys present for core lanes.

GET /api/signals/micro 200 — fresh sweep gi≈0.655 composite with 10 instrument errors (OpenAQ, NWS, OpenLibrary, data.gov, UN, OECD, Cloudflare Radar, Fastly, crt.sh, FRED); persistent third-party degradation vs nominal lanes. Micro payload cycle field C-306 vs integrity/ATLAS C-313 (metadata drift).

GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.734 mode yellow degraded true; gi_verified false. Coherent with stressed external plane; headline GI above live micro composite.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
POST /api/vault/attest returned HTTP 404; quorum_status not returned — route not present on deployed surface.
POST /api/agents/journal returned HTTP 502 with github_403 — substrate canon write blocked; journal entry not registered.

recommendation: Deploy or alias POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum registration. Restore GitHub credentials/permissions for agent journal substrate writes. Reconcile micro sweep cycle metadata with KV CURRENT_CYCLE. Treat headline GI as KV-backed but compare to fresh micro composite before operator decisions; monitor persistent upstream instrument failures.
